MOORE
MOORE'S LAW WILL STOP WHEN PHYSICAL LIMITS PREVENT FURTHER SHRINKING OF TRANSISTORS ON SILICON CHIPS. SCIENTISTS PREDICT THIS CEILING AROUND THE YEAR 2025 AS QUANTUM EFFECTS AND HEAT DISSIPATION BECOME UNMANAGEABLE FOR CURRENT TECHNOLOGIES.
